creator: n_hibma@calcaphon.com
text:
If you are still running FreeBSD 3.x could you check whether the patch
given in
the URL below works for you?

If you are running 4.x-STABLE or 5.0-CURRENT by now, please update your
sources and let us
know whether the problem persists. The problem has been solved in recent
version of
ppb_base. we think.

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/dev/ppbus/ppb_base.c.diff?r1=1.10&r2=1.10.2.1

Nick
-- 
Work: n_hibma@qubesoft.com             Personal: n_hibma@webweaving.org
